regex: (This review integrates|This section discusses|Here, we review|本文整合|本节讨论)
instruction: Open with a concrete problem, not review metanarrative.
Avoid repeated not-X-but-Y thesis packaging.
Framework terms must be earned by evidence and should not replace claims.

regex: (future studies are needed|further validation is required|requires prospective validation|仍需进一步研究|需要进一步验证|临床转化仍面临挑战)
instruction: Replace generic validation with a specific missing proof.
Do not use one sentence as a compressed search-result bundle.
Manuscript prose must not expose production workflow or LLM UI traces.
Tables must adjudicate evidence, not merely store it.

regex: (important implications|provides new insights|has significant potential|is promising)
instruction: Generic importance language cannot substitute for a claim.
Do not let atlas/method/background evidence lead a direct biological or clinical claim.
If the section opening could fit another section, rewrite from the section-specific tension.

regex: (as an ai language model|i cannot|i do not have access|here is a summary)
instruction: Remove LLM role and refusal traces; return to write if factual support is missing.

regex: (insert citation|citation needed|fill in|real numbers|待补充|补充引用)
instruction: Citation placeholders are not polishable; return to write or plan.
Remove ornamental synthesis unless it ranks evidence.

regex: (furthermore|moreover|overall|taken together|it is worth noting|值得注意的是)
instruction: Reduce mechanical connective cadence.
Use em dashes sparingly and only for high-value interruption or contrast.

regex: (plays a crucial role|is critical for|is important for)
instruction: Replace importance assertions with what the evidence does.

regex: (including but not limited to|such as .{0,80}, and .{0,80}, and)
instruction: Avoid list-like topic coverage when the section needs adjudication.

regex: (this manuscript|this paper argues|this section|as discussed below|as shown below)
instruction: Remove manuscript metanarrative from body prose.

regex: (should guide treatment|can be used to select therapy|directs therapy)
instruction: Do not turn association into treatment-directive guidance without evidence.

regex: (mechanistically proves|establishes the mechanism|definitively demonstrates the pathway)
instruction: Mechanistic hypotheses must remain hypotheses unless the evidence is direct.

regex: (In recent years|With the rapid development|There has been growing interest)
instruction: Replace generic transition with the section-specific problem.

regex: (polished version|revised paragraph|the revised text|the discussion now)
instruction: Visible revision traces cannot remain in manuscript prose.
